nl_query: Which evaluators are currently in the pool for active boards but have no active script assignments, and show their faculty name, department, and the boards they are eligible for.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.academic_unit, b.name AS board_name, ep.employee_id, ep.eligible_role, ep.is_available
FROM   evaluator_pool ep
JOIN   faculty_cache  fc ON fc.employee_id = ep.employee_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = fc.department_id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = ep.board_id
WHERE  ep.is_available = TRUE
  AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1 FROM script_assignment sa
         WHERE  sa.evaluator_id = ep.employee_id
           AND  sa.is_active = TRUE
       )
GROUP  BY fc.name, au.academic_unit, b.name, ep.employee_id, ep.eligible_role, ep.is_available
ORDER  BY fc.name, au.academic_unit, b.name, ep.employee_id, ep.eligible_role, ep.is_available
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): academic_unit.academic_unit, board.name, academic_unit.academic_unit, board.name, academic_unit.academic_unit. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
